summary: AI Confidence Gate Feature Testing - Backend 100% (25/25 tests passed), Frontend verified via screenshots. All confidence gate endpoints working. SentCom Intelligence panel renders correctly on NIA page with trading mode, decision stats, and decision log. Fixed 2 backend bugs: MongoDB truth testing and import error.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB truth testing bug in /api/ai-training/model-inventory - changed 'if mongo_db:' to 'if mongo_db is not None:'
Fixed MongoDB truth testing bug in /api/ai-training/status - same fix
Fixed import error in model-inventory endpoint - changed from non-existent 'get_setup_training_config, ALL_SETUP_TYPES' to correct 'SETUP_TRAINING_PROFILES, get_setup_profiles, get_model_name'
GET /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/summary returns trading_mode, today stats, streak - VERIFIED
GET /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/decisions returns recent decisions array - VERIFIED
GET /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/stats returns go_count, skip_count, reduce_count - VERIFIED
POST /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/evaluate returns decision, confidence_score, reasoning, regime info - VERIFIED
GET /api/ai-training/regime-live returns regime, indexes, cross data - VERIFIED
GET /api/ai-training/model-inventory returns categories with model lists (63 total defined) - VERIFIED
Frontend NIA page shows SentCom Intelligence panel with NORMAL trading mode - VERIFIED
Frontend NIA page shows Training Pipeline panel with regime badge - VERIFIED
Frontend MarketRegimeWidget shows on Command Center with expand button - VERIFIED (score 65.1, Neutral status)
seed_data_creation: None - confidence gate stats show 0 evaluated/taken/skipped because SentCom bot isn't actively trading on preview env
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Confidence Gate feature fully implemented. Backend endpoints all working after 2 bug fixes. Frontend SentCom Intelligence panel renders on NIA page with trading mode (NORMAL), decision stats (0/0/0), and empty decision log. MarketRegimeWidget shows on Command Center with score 65.1 and Neutral status. Cold-start bootstrap fix in trading_bot_service.py lines 782-804 handles 0W/0L trades by using REDUCE_SIZE action with 50% position.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/sum: Returns trading_mode=normal, today={evaluated:0, taken:0, skipped:0}, streak=null - VERIFIED
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/dec: Returns decisions=[] (empty, no trades yet) - VERIFIED
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/sta: Returns go_count=0, skip_count=0, reduce_count=0, total_evaluated=0 - VERIFIED
backend_endpoints.POST /api/ai-training/confidence-gate/ev: Returns decision=GO/REDUCE/SKIP, confidence_score, reasoning array, regime info - VERIFIED
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ai-training/regime-live: Returns regime classification, index data (SPY/QQQ/IWM), cross correlations - VERIFIED
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ai-training/model-inventory: Returns 63 total defined models across 8 categories - VERIFIED (after fix)

cold_start_fix.behavior: When wins+losses=0 but sample_size>=5, returns REDUCE_SIZE action with 50% position instead of blocking trade
cold_start_fix.verified: Code review confirmed bootstrap mode logic

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'if mongo_db is not None:'

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'if mongo_db is not None:'
